descriptions.exploratory: Dirty tree OK, 1 rep, unsupported settings OK. Cannot support paper claims.
descriptions.controlled: Committed revision, frozen workload, recognized machine, known model hash, complete provenance. Can support optimization promotion.
descriptions.claim_candidate: Controlled + preregistered metrics, repetition policy, thermal/power controls, correctness comparison.
descriptions.archival: Claim_candidate included in frozen dataset release.
descriptions.legacy_provisional: Predates evidence plane. Marked as NOT authoritative.
